data.executiveSummary: The frontend-web service experienced elevated CPU usage above 90% but maintained a 0.00% error rate. Latency and trace data could not be examined due to timeouts in data fetching.

rootCause.title: High CPU Usage
rootCause.description: The root cause of the incident is identified as high CPU usage, reaching 91.52%, which could lead to slower processing of requests.

data.impact: Users may have experienced slower response times, although there were no errors recorded.
recommendedActions: Investigate and resolve high CPU consumption to prevent potential latency issues.
Optimize code to handle processor-intensive tasks more efficiently.
